step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("has zp-pth been tested in a phase ii clinical trial")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You MUST include:
1) A brief statement agreeing or disagreeing with the previous conclusion, including ONE NEW REASON from the retrieved evidence.
2) Your clear answer choice in boxed notation (\boxed{choice})
Previous Conclusion: B (no)
New Reason: Despite extensive coverage of well-known PTH analogues like teriparatide and abaloparatide—including detailed descriptions of their phase II trials—the documentation specifically excludes any references to "ZP-PTH" across all sources. Notably, neither the names nor the properties of ZP-PTH appear in any of the studies cited regarding phase II evaluations of similar compounds. Even though abaloparatide and teriparatide demonstrate successful phase II results, no mention exists linking them—or any other compound—to ZP-PTH.
Final Decision: Agree with previous conclusion.
